personal.name: Divyang Dheer
personal.about: I’m a React Native, React.js & Node.js Developer with 2+ years of experience building scalable, production-ready web and mobile applications. So far, I have worked on 7 production-level mobile apps, and I’m currently working on an exciting project that allows users to build fully functional mobile apps without writing a single line of code.

skillsCategories.title: 🚀 Deployment & Release Management
items: Handling certificates, provisioning profiles, TestFlight, etc.
